info.name: Paystack Dedicated Virtual Accounts API
info.description:
Create and manage dedicated NUBAN virtual bank accounts for customers so they can receive payments via bank transfer with automatic reconciliation.

Contact Support:
 Name: Paystack Support
 Email: support@paystack.com
